description.value:
As a bonus action, you can magically teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see. You can use this trait a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.

Autumn. Immediately after you use your Fey Step, up to two creatures of your choice that you can see within 10 feet of you must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw (DC = 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma modifier) or be charmed by you for 1 minute, or until you or your companions deal any damage to the creatures.
